failures.description: The agent called ProductCatalogSearch with malformed arguments: it omitted the required item_id and used product_id 0 instead of the provided string product_id "1762337868".
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to get the price of item 1345513440 using ProductCatalogSearch with the provided item_id and product_id. The Coordinator had already provided the needed values: item_id "1345513440" and product_id "1762337868". At index 2, the Researcher produced tool args {"product_id": 0}, omitting required item_id and changing product_id from a string to an integer. The next step confirms this caused a SchemaError. This is an ill-formed tool invocation, not an unsupported intent or missing user information.
